About Me

A quick look at my background

I'm currently pursuing a B.Sc. in Computer Applications at Mumbai University (2024–2027), and recently completed a three-month internship at TechNova Solutions, working across both frontend and backend teams.

On the frontend, I built and maintained responsive interfaces for client-facing products. On the backend, I designed Node.js/Express APIs with JWT authentication and MongoDB schemas supporting dashboards handling thousands of daily records.

Before that, I freelanced teaching Python and C++ to college students — turning core CS concepts into assignments and reference notes they still use today.
